## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Desktop layout unchanged (design is frozen — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Any new data points include cited sources
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes (mobile + desktop)
